indications.name: Lung cancer
indications.description: Malignant tumors of the lung, including small cell and non-small cell lung carcinoma.

indications.name: Non-small cell lung cancer
indications.description: A group of lung cancers that behave in a similar way, including adenocarcinoma, squamous cell carcinoma, and large cell carcinoma.

indications.name: Breast cancer
indications.description: Malignant tumor that develops from breast cells.

indications.name: Colorectal cancer
indications.description: Cancer that starts in the colon or rectum, often developing from polyps.

indications.name: Rheumatoid arthritis
indications.description: Chronic autoimmune disease characterized by joint inflammation and progressive destruction.

indications.name: Psoriatic arthritis
indications.description: Inflammatory arthritis associated with psoriasis, affecting joints and entheses.

indications.name: Type 2 diabetes mellitus
indications.description: Metabolic disorder characterized by insulin resistance and relative insulin deficiency.

indications.name: Type 1 diabetes mellitus
indications.description: Autoimmune-mediated destruction of pancreatic beta cells leading to absolute insulin deficiency.

indications.name: Hypertension
indications.description: Persistently elevated arterial blood pressure associated with increased cardiovascular risk.

indications.name: Heart failure
indications.description: Clinical syndrome resulting from structural or functional cardiac disorders impairing the ability of the ventricle to fill or eject blood.

indications.name: Bacterial pneumonia
indications.description: Acute infection of the lung parenchyma caused by bacteria, leading to inflammation and consolidation.

indications.name: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease
indications.description: Progressive lung disease characterized by airflow limitation that is not fully reversible.

indications.name: Influenza
indications.description: Acute viral infection of the respiratory tract caused by influenza viruses.

indications.name: Osteoporosis
indications.description: Skeletal disorder characterized by compromised bone strength predisposing to an increased risk of fracture.

job_postings.title: Quality Assurance Manager
job_postings.description: Lead the QA team at our Berlin manufacturing site, ensuring compliance with GMP and global quality standards.
job_postings.responsibilities: Oversee site quality system, manage audits and inspections, approve validation protocols, and mentor QA staff.
job_postings.requirements: Pharmacy, chemistry, or related degree; 7+ years in pharmaceutical QA; strong knowledge of EU GMP; fluent in English and German.

job_postings.title: Quality Assurance Specialist
job_postings.description: Support day-to-day QA operations for our solid dosage manufacturing facility in Munich.
job_postings.responsibilities: Batch record review, deviation handling, CAPA tracking, and document control in accordance with GMP.
job_postings.requirements: Science degree or equivalent; 3+ years in GMP environment; experience with batch documentation and QA systems.

job_postings.title: Quality Assurance Analyst
job_postings.description: Entry-level QA role supporting release of sterile injectable products at our Frankfurt site.
job_postings.responsibilities: Perform document checks, support internal audits, and assist with quality metrics reporting.
job_postings.requirements: Bachelor's degree in life sciences; attention to detail; interest in pharmaceutical quality systems.

job_postings.title: Quality Assurance Engineer
job_postings.description: Provide QA support for technology transfers and process validation at our Basel biologics site.
job_postings.responsibilities: Review validation documentation, support tech transfer projects, and ensure compliance with global procedures.
job_postings.requirements: Engineering or science degree; 5+ years in biologics manufacturing or QA; experience with process validation.

job_postings.title: Regulatory Affairs Specialist
job_postings.description: Prepare and maintain regulatory submissions for EU markets, focusing on small molecule oncology products.
job_postings.responsibilities: Compile CTD dossiers, manage variations, and interact with health authorities as needed.
job_postings.requirements: Degree in pharmacy or life sciences; 2+ years in regulatory affairs; understanding of EU registration procedures.

job_postings.title: Manufacturing Technician
job_postings.description: Operate equipment and perform in-process checks in our oral solid dosage facility.
job_postings.responsibilities: Execute manufacturing steps according to batch records, document activities, and maintain GMP compliance.
job_postings.requirements: High school diploma or equivalent; prior experience in GMP manufacturing preferred.

sustainability_targets.title: Reduce CO2 emissions by 30% by 2030
sustainability_targets.description: We aim to reduce absolute Scope 1 and 2 CO2 emissions from our global operations by 30% by 2030 compared to a 2020 baseline.
sustainability_targets.scope: Scope 1 and 2 greenhouse gas emissions from all manufacturing, R&D, and office sites worldwide.

sustainability_targets.title: Improve energy efficiency by 20% by 2030
sustainability_targets.description: Increase energy efficiency across manufacturing and R&D sites through upgrades and process optimization.
sustainability_targets.scope: Electricity and fuel consumption per unit of production at major sites.

sustainability_targets.title: Reduce water use in manufacturing by 15% by 2030
sustainability_targets.description: Decrease freshwater withdrawal at water-stressed sites by optimizing cleaning processes and recycling.
sustainability_targets.scope: Manufacturing sites located in high and extremely high water-stress regions.

therapeutic_areas.name: Oncology
therapeutic_areas.description: Products and research focused on the prevention, diagnosis, and treatment of cancer.

therapeutic_areas.name: Cardiology
therapeutic_areas.description: Therapies for cardiovascular diseases including hypertension, heart failure, and arrhythmias.

therapeutic_areas.name: Diabetes
therapeutic_areas.description: Medicines and solutions for the management of type 1 and type 2 diabetes.

therapeutic_areas.name: Rheumatology
therapeutic_areas.description: Treatments for inflammatory and degenerative joint and connective tissue diseases.

therapeutic_areas.name: Respiratory
therapeutic_areas.description: Products addressing acute and chronic respiratory conditions such as COPD, asthma, and infections.

therapeutic_areas.name: Infectious Diseases
therapeutic_areas.description: Antibiotics, antivirals, and other therapies targeting bacterial, viral, and parasitic infections.

clinical_trials.title: Phase III Study of Rhemabrix in Adults With Active Rheumatoid Arthritis
clinical_trials.brief_summary: A randomized, double-blind Phase III trial evaluating the efficacy and safety of Rhemabrix in adults with moderate to severe rheumatoid arthritis.
clinical_trials.detailed_description: This multicenter, randomized, double-blind Phase III study evaluates the efficacy, safety, and tolerability of Rhemabrix compared with standard-of-care DMARD therapy in adult patients aged 18 to 65 years with active rheumatoid arthritis inadequately controlled on methotrexate. The study includes sites across Spain, Portugal, and Italy, with a planned treatment duration of 52 weeks.

clinical_trials.title: Phase II Dose-Finding Study of Rhemabrix in Rheumatoid Arthritis
clinical_trials.brief_summary: A Phase II, dose-ranging study in patients with rheumatoid arthritis receiving background methotrexate.
clinical_trials.detailed_description: This Phase II study assesses multiple dose levels of Rhemabrix in adults with rheumatoid arthritis who have had an inadequate response to methotrexate. The primary objective is to identify the optimal dose for Phase III development based on ACR response and safety profile.

clinical_trials.title: Global Phase III Trial of Glucotar in Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus
clinical_trials.brief_summary: A Phase III study to evaluate the glycemic efficacy and cardiovascular outcomes of Glucotar in patients with type 2 diabetes.
clinical_trials.detailed_description: This large, event-driven Phase III trial evaluates the effect of Glucotar on glycemic control and major adverse cardiovascular events in adults with type 2 diabetes mellitus at high cardiovascular risk. Participants will be followed for a median of 3 years.

clinical_trials.title: Phase III Trial of Oncava Plus Standard Chemotherapy in Advanced NSCLC
clinical_trials.brief_summary: A randomized Phase III trial comparing Oncava plus standard platinum-based chemotherapy versus chemotherapy alone in advanced NSCLC.
clinical_trials.detailed_description: Adult patients with stage IIIB/IV non-small cell lung cancer and no prior systemic therapy for advanced disease are randomized to receive Oncava in combination with platinum-based doublet chemotherapy or chemotherapy alone. The primary endpoint is overall survival; key secondary endpoints include progression-free survival and objective response rate.

clinical_trials.title: Phase III Study of Cardiolim in Chronic Heart Failure
clinical_trials.brief_summary: A Phase III trial assessing Cardiolim on top of standard-of-care therapy in patients with chronic heart failure.
clinical_trials.detailed_description: This randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled Phase III trial evaluates whether Cardiolim, added to guideline-directed medical therapy, reduces the composite endpoint of cardiovascular death or heart failure hospitalization in patients with reduced ejection fraction.

clinical_trials.title: Post-Marketing Phase IV Study of Pulmocare in COPD
clinical_trials.brief_summary: An observational Phase IV study collecting real-world safety and effectiveness data for Pulmocare in COPD.
clinical_trials.detailed_description: This non-interventional Phase IV study follows patients with COPD treated with Pulmocare in routine clinical practice. Data are collected on exacerbation rates, lung function, and patient-reported outcomes.

clinical_trials.title: Phase II/III Study of Osteofix in Postmenopausal Osteoporosis
clinical_trials.brief_summary: A seamless Phase II/III study to evaluate Osteofix in preventing fractures in women with postmenopausal osteoporosis.
clinical_trials.detailed_description: The study includes a dose-finding Phase II part followed by an expanded Phase III efficacy confirmation part, using vertebral fracture incidence as the primary endpoint.

clinical_trials.title: Phase III Long-Term Extension Study of Rhemabrix in Rheumatoid Arthritis
clinical_trials.brief_summary: An open-label Phase III extension study assessing the long-term safety of Rhemabrix in rheumatoid arthritis.
clinical_trials.detailed_description: Patients completing prior Rhemabrix randomized controlled trials are eligible to enroll in this long-term extension to receive Rhemabrix in an open-label fashion for up to 5 years. Safety and durability of response are the primary objectives.

events.description: A live webinar for healthcare professionals on titrating basal and bolus insulin in adults with type 2 diabetes.

events.title: Emerging Therapies in Diabetes: Cardiometabolic Benefits of GLP-1 RAs

events.title: Advances in Heart Failure Management 2026
events.description: Regional cardiology symposium covering guideline updates and novel therapies in heart failure.

events.description: A two-day meeting focused on advances in targeted and immunotherapies for lung cancer.

events.title: Treat-to-Target Strategies in Rheumatoid Arthritis
events.description: Webinar discussing practical implementation of treat-to-target strategies in RA.

events.description: Interactive workshop on optimizing antibiotic use and combating resistance.

products.name: Atrolim 50 mg tablets
products.indications_text: Atrolim is indicated as an adjunct to diet for the treatment of hypertension and to reduce the risk of cardiovascular events.
products.description: Film-coated tablets containing 50 mg atorvastatin for once-daily oral administration.

products.name: Atrolim 100 mg tablets
products.indications_text: Atrolim 100 mg is indicated for patients requiring intensive lipid lowering and blood pressure reduction.
products.description: High-strength film-coated tablets containing 100 mg atorvastatin for oral administration.

products.name: Oncava 50 mg tablets
products.indications_text: Oncava is indicated for the treatment of patients with locally advanced or metastatic lung cancer with activating EGFR mutations.
products.description: Oncava 50 mg film-coated tablets for oral use, targeted therapy for EGFR-mutated lung cancer.

products.name: Pulmacta 50 mg tablets
products.indications_text: Pulmacta is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with locally advanced or metastatic EGFR T790M mutation-positive non-small cell lung cancer.
products.description: Pulmacta 50 mg tablets provide targeted inhibition of mutant EGFR in lung cancer.

products.name: Oncava 100 mg tablets
products.indications_text: Oncava 100 mg is indicated for first-line treatment of patients with metastatic EGFR-mutated non-small cell lung cancer.
products.description: Higher-strength Oncava tablets for patients requiring 100 mg dosing.

products.name: Oncava 50 mg capsules
products.indications_text: Oncava 50 mg capsules are indicated for adult patients with EGFR-mutated lung cancer who cannot swallow tablets.
products.description: Hard gelatin capsules containing 50 mg gefitinib.

products.name: Cefrolim 1 g Injection
products.indications_text: Cefrolim Injection is indicated for the treatment of severe bacterial pneumonia and other susceptible infections in adults and children.
products.description: Sterile powder for solution for injection containing ceftriaxone 1 g per vial for IV or IM administration.

products.name: Cefrolim 500 mg Injection
products.indications_text: Cefrolim 500 mg Injection is indicated for moderate bacterial infections including community-acquired pneumonia.
products.description: Sterile powder for solution containing 500 mg ceftriaxone per vial.

products.name: Cefrolim 500 mg tablets
products.indications_text: Cefrolim 500 mg tablets are indicated for the oral treatment of bacterial pneumonia and other susceptible infections.
products.description: Film-coated oral tablets containing 500 mg cefuroxime.

products.name: Diabetra 10 mg tablets
products.indications_text: Diabetra is indicated as an adjunct to diet and exercise to improve glycemic control in adults with type 2 diabetes mellitus.
products.description: Once-daily SGLT2 inhibitor for oral administration to adults with type 2 diabetes.

products.name: Cardiolim 20 mg tablets
products.indications_text: Cardiolim is indicated for the treatment of hypertension and chronic heart failure.

products.name: Rheumava 15 mg tablets
products.indications_text: Rheumava is indicated for the treatment of active rheumatoid arthritis and severe psoriatic arthritis in adults.
products.description: Low-dose methotrexate tablets intended for once-weekly dosing.

products.name: Pulmocare Inhalation Solution
products.indications_text: Pulmocare is indicated for the maintenance treatment of airflow obstruction in patients with COPD.
products.description: Metered-dose inhalation solution delivering 2.5 mcg tiotropium bromide per actuation.

products.name: Osteofix 70 mg tablets
products.indications_text: Osteofix is indicated for the treatment and prevention of osteoporosis in postmenopausal women.
